rules.description: The enrollment fee must meet specific conditions relative to the catalog fee and attendance percentage
rules.condition: (enrollment.fee - catalog.fee) == 1700 and enrollment.fee % 250 == 0 and 1.0 < (enrollment.fee / catalog.fee) <= 1.5 and 75 <= exam.min_attendance_pct <= 100 and (exam.min_attendance_pct * enrollment.fee / 100) >= (catalog.fee - 200)
rules.on_failure: Adjust the enrollment fee to meet the specified conditions

rules.description: Student qualifies for the exam based on course name and attendance or fee clearance and eligibility
rules.condition: Check whether the course name contains 'Basics' or 'Intro' and the student's attendance percentage is 75 or higher, or if the course name does not contain 'Basics' or 'Intro', the student has cleared the exam fee and is marked as eligible
rules.on_failure: The student does not qualify for the exam due to insufficient attendance or uncleared exam fee

rules.description: Student must be marked as eligible if their exam fee is cleared
rules.on_failure: Update the student's eligibility status to eligible

rules.description: Each course must have exactly one student enrolled
rules.condition: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT student_name) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM ENROLL_USER.ENROLLMENT WHERE course_id = :course_id
rules.on_failure: Enroll exactly one student in the course

rules.description: The student must have paid their exam fees, be attending at least 70 percent of classes, and be marked as eligible.
rules.on_failure: The student needs to pay their exam fees, attend more classes, or be marked as eligible.

rules.description: Each course must have exactly one distinct student name enrolled
rules.condition: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT student_name) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM ENROLL_USER.ENROLLMENT WHERE course_id = :course_id
rules.on_failure: Update the enrollment records to ensure each course has only one distinct student name

rules.description: The average catalog fee across all courses must be less than Rs.10000
rules.condition: SELECT CASE WHEN AVG(fee) < 10000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM CATALOG_USER.COURSE_CATALOG
rules.on_failure: The average catalog fee is too high and needs to be adjusted
